---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for laravel-invite-only
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Feature Description

What feature would you like to see in the package?

### Why Is This Needed?

Describe the problem this solves or the use case it enables. Is it related to invitations, reminders, tokens, events, polymorphic relations, etc.?

### Suggested API / Implementation

If you have an idea of how this should look, share a code sketch.

```php
// e.g. proposed method signature or usage example
```

### Alternatives Considered

Are there workarounds you've tried, or alternative approaches you've ruled out?

### Backwards Compatibility

Would this change break existing API surface (traits, models, events, migrations, config)?

### Additional Context

Add any relevant links, references, or related issues.
